description: AviationData.Systems provides airport data lookup services, including airport search by name or IATA code, nearest-airport queries, and country airport lists. The known public developer artifact is an OpenAPI description for its Airports API v1.
summary: aviationdata.systems exposes one known HTTP API surface: the Airports API v1, documented by a public OpenAPI/Swagger spec at api.apis.guru with base URL https://api.aviationdata.systems; authentication could not be verified from reachable first-party docs.
